goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit artifact builder for runtime patch audit receipt record audit authorities without runtime execution, durable audit writes, patch application, route/server mutation, or permit consumption.
scope_out: Do not execute runtime, write audits, perform durable persistence, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Runtime patch audit receipt record audit authority artifacts can produce an in-memory audit artifact.
Audited-at ref and audit evidence ref are required.
Runtime execution, audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, route/server mutation, and permit consumption remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing audited-at ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime execution, durable audit write, durable persistence, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-201 authorized runtime patch audit receipt record audit artifacts without recording them.
